content: Receive one full year of access to all functional enhancements and security updates

comment.text: This key provides the description for a benefit highlighting one year of access to functional improvements and security updates. It appears within a benefits container, likely on a page displaying package details or payment options. Translators should ensure the description accurately conveys the value of ongoing access to updates.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'сигурност актуалности' is grammatically incorrect and conveys a broken meaning. It should be 'актуалности за сигурността' (security updates) to correctly translate 'security updates'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Получете една пълна година достъп до всички функционални подобрения и актуализации за сигурността

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Saajaan' is a noun meaning 'To the recipient' or 'For the recipient', whereas the English text uses the imperative verb 'Receive'. This changes the sentence from an instruction/benefit to a fragmented noun phrase.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Saat yhden koko vuoden pääsyn kaikkiin toiminnallisiin parannuksiin ja tietoturvapäivityksiin

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Armenian word 'Մուտք ունկնդրեք' is a typo/nonsense word. It seems to be a combination of 'Մուտք' (Access/Entry) and 'ունկնդրեք' (which is not a valid Armenian word, likely a typo for 'ունենաք' or a failed attempt at 'ապահովեք'). The current phrasing 'Մուտք ունկնդրեք' does not correctly convey 'Receive access'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ստացեք մեկ ամբողջ տարվա հասանելիություն բոլոր ֆունկցիոնալ բարելավումներին և անվտանգության թարմացումներին։

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error in case declension: 'visām funkcionālajām uzlabojumiem' is incorrect. The noun 'uzlabojumiem' (dative plural) requires the adjective to be 'visiem funkcionālajiem uzlabojumiem'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Saņemiet vienu pilnu gadu piekļuvi visiem funkcionālajiem uzlabojumiem un drošības atjauninājumiem

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Russian translation adds 'настроек' (settings) to 'security updates', changing 'security updates' to 'security settings updates', which is not what the English text says.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Получите годовой доступ ко всем функциональным улучшениям и обновлениям безопасности

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'celonočne' means 'all-night' or 'overnight', which is a mistranslation of 'full' (as in a full year).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Prejemajte eno celo leto dostopa do vseh funkcionalnih izboljšav in varnostnih posodobitev

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'сигурносног' is a typo/incorrect form; the correct adjective for 'security' in this context is 'безбедносних'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Добијте приступ на целу годину свих функционалних унапређења и безбедносних ажурирања.
